subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! Thy letter was received. Praised be God that it brought tidings of the guidance of Mírzá Farrukh Khán, that eager soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء نامه شما رسید الحمد لله خبر هدایت میرزا فرخ خان داشت که آن مشتاق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
